calendar.matters:
Motion To Determine The Amount Of Attys' Fees To Be Awarded To Defts
Off Calendar Apr-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Martin Zurada, Esq. (415) 637-8483, for Defendant and Moving Party 327 Bay Street Associates and Yee
David J. Yang, Esq. (415) 982-7315 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Yang
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT 327 BAY STREET ASSOCIATES and ROBERT YEE'S Motion To Determine The Amount Of Attorneys' Fees To Be Awarded To Defendants is GRANTED in the amount of $9,000.00 (40 hours at $225/hour). Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And Award Of Attys' Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Costs(Summary)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Martin Zurada, Esq. (415) 637-8483 for Defendant and Moving Party 327 Bay Street Associates
David J. Yang, Esq. (415) 982-7315, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Yang
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT 327 BAY STREET ASSOCIATES, A CA. LIMITED PARTNERSH, ROBERT YEE'S Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs: 1) Motion Declaring Defendants as prevailing party is GRANTED; 2) Hearing required on attorneys fees to be awarded. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
